entries.shortDescription: Red macroalgae with bushy pom-pom growth form; thrives tumbling in a refugium, consumes nitrates and phosphates, inhibits pest algae, and serves as tang food and copepod habitat.
entries.notes: Likely overlaps with AlgaeBarn (Gracilaria is a staple); pom-pom morphotype may differ.

entries.shortDescription: Vibrant red display macroalgae for show tanks; used for light nutrient export and visual interest; tumbles well in refugiums.
entries.notes: Sold out at time of crawl. Likely overlaps with AlgaeBarn — Dragon's Breath is widely stocked.

entries.shortDescription: Red Ogo form of Gracilaria; popular tang food and display macro with strong nutrient uptake; best tumbled in refugium.
entries.notes: Sold out at time of crawl. Likely overlaps with AlgaeBarn — Red Ogo is a standard refugium staple.

entries.shortDescription: Red macroalgae with iridescent sparkle; compact broccoli-like growth form; tumbles in refugium with adequate white-spectrum lighting.
entries.notes: Likely UNIQUE to TSA or rare elsewhere — the 'Atomic Broccoli' trade name and sparkle morphotype do not appear to be a standard AlgaeBarn offering. Scientific name unknown; possibly a Halymenia or Botryocladia variant.

entries.shortDescription: Slow-growing blue-purple macroalgae for display; prefers high light and strong flow; shipped as 1–1.5 inch ball.
entries.notes: Likely UNIQUE to TSA or rare elsewhere — Blue Hypnea with blue-purple coloration is not a standard AlgaeBarn SKU and represents an uncommon color morph.

entries.shortDescription: Fast-growing green refugium macro; excellent nutrient exporter; tumbles in refugium with ample water movement.
entries.notes: Likely overlaps with AlgaeBarn — Chaeto is universally stocked.

entries.shortDescription: Ultra-bright red variant of Dragon's Breath; used for nutrient control and display; tumbles in refugium; tangs will graze it.
entries.notes: Likely UNIQUE to TSA — described as an exclusive variant of Dragon's Breath with intensified red coloration. Not a standard AlgaeBarn SKU.

entries.shortDescription: Bundle of three macroalgae: Dragon's Breath, Chaetomorpha, and Pom Pom Gracilaria; designed for nutrient management and aesthetics.
entries.notes: Bundle product — not a distinct species entry; sold out at time of crawl. Components are individually listed above. Skip for species DB; useful for cross-referencing common TSA combinations.
